summary: Completed all 3 prerequisites and all 20 steps for LSP core infrastructure. Implemented: (1) convert module with offset_to_position, span_to_range, convert_diagnostic, convert_parse_error; (2) DocumentStore with open/update/close/get; (3) compute_diagnostics pipeline (parse→compile→check); (4) ReifyLanguageServer with initialize, did_open, did_change, did_close; (5) CLI 'lsp' subcommand with run_server entry point; (6) full lifecycle integration test. All 30 tests pass, clippy is clean. Required adding io-std and io-util tokio features for stdin/stdout support.

Completed post-review UTF-8 boundary safety fix. Step-21: added 6 failing tests proving offset_to_position panics when byte offsets land mid-character in multi-byte UTF-8 sequences (2-byte, 3-byte, 4-byte chars, second-line mid-char, span mid-char). Step-22: fixed by snapping clamped offset forward to next valid char boundary using str::is_char_boundary(). All 34 tests pass (19 convert + 14 other + 1 integration), clippy clean. All plan steps now complete.

Completed all 2 prerequisites and all 18 steps for interactive edit loop E2E. Implemented: (1) bracket_source_with_width/bracket_source_violating fixtures + box realization on bracket_compiled_module; (2) Engine::check_snapshot() for incremental constraint checking from snapshot; (3) Engine::build_snapshot() for incremental geometry from snapshot; (4) 6 engine-level integration tests proving eval→edit_param→check_snapshot/build_snapshot pipeline with journal verification; (5) EvalState + compute_diagnostics_with_state() stateful LSP diagnostics pipeline; (6) 3 LSP-level tests including capstone E2E lifecycle; (7) ServerState updated to use persistent EvalState with Mutex wrapper for Send+Sync. All 263 tests pass across reify-eval, reify-lsp, reify-test-support. Clippy clean.
